refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall ensure operational availability meets or exceeds the customer-defined target by minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.
refined_fr.rationale: Availability KPI is decomposed to focus on minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery, which are key contributors to availability. This allows targeted design parameters and implementation modules to address these aspects.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure actual operational uptime and downtime over the evaluation period and compare against the customer-defined availability target.
sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and restoration of NGHE solution after faults.

candidate_dps: DP1: Implement predictive maintenance and fault detection systems to minimize unplanned downtime.
DP2: Design modular and redundant system components to enable rapid recovery and fault isolation.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1 and DP2 combined to address both minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.

potential_sources: Predictive maintenance algorithms depend on telemetry data from vehicle and safety services.
Modular design requires clear interface definitions between vehicle and teleoperation modules.
coupling_check.notes: Coupling is manageable with well-defined interfaces and data flows.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of reliable telemetry data for predictive maintenance.
Risk of incomplete fault detection coverage impacting availability.
Risk of recovery delays due to complex module interactions.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider adding explicit fault isolation and recovery sub-FRs if further decomposition is needed.

im_boundary.name: NGHE Solution
im_boundary.scope: Overall system-level responsibility for availability including predictive maintenance and recovery coordination.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Receives real-time operational data from Vehicle and Safety Services for fault detection.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Sends maintenance and recovery commands to Vehicle and Teleoperation modules.

external_interfaces.name: SafetyAlert
external_interfaces.details: Coordinates safety-related alerts impacting availability and recovery.

external_interfaces.name: Network Link
external_interfaces.details: Supports communication between NGHE Solution and distributed modules.

module_containment_scores.notes: Centralizes availability logic and coordination, minimizing diffusion.
Contains physical components but availability logic is distributed.
Limited containment of availability logic, some diffusion due to remote control.
Safety alerts impact availability but logic is partially contained.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Centralizing availability-related logic and coordination in the NGHE Solution module reduces diffusion and improves maintainability.
containment_risks: Potential bottleneck or single point of failure if NGHE Solution module is overloaded.
Interface complexity with multiple modules may increase integration risk.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Monitor interface complexity and consider modularizing availability sub-functions if diffusion increases.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DPs logically satisfy the refined FRs with clear mapping to minimizing downtime and enabling rapid recovery.

diffusion_risks: Some diffusion of availability logic into Vehicle and Safety Services modules due to telemetry and safety alert dependencies.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment is strongest in NGHE Solution module, which is appropriate for system-level availability management.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Availability can be verified via operational data collected through Telemetry and Network Link interfaces.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Allocation of availability responsibility to NGHE Solution module is clear and aligns with system ownership.

recommended_revisions: Consider further decomposition of recovery functions if verification complexity increases.
Review interface definitions periodically to manage diffusion risks.

decision.justification: The current level of decomposition sufficiently addresses the availability KPI with clear FR refinement, DP selection, and IM assignment. Interfaces and containment are well defined with manageable risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1: Minimize unplanned downtime of the NGHE solution.
FR2: Enable rapid recovery and restoration of NGHE solution after faults.

revise.why: No immediate revision needed; proceed to next decomposition level if desired.

assumptions: Reliable telemetry data is available for predictive maintenance.
System modules can communicate effectively over defined interfaces.
open_risks: Potential single point of failure in NGHE Solution module.
Interface complexity may increase integration risk.
evidence_needed: Operational availability data over evaluation period.
Verification of fault detection and recovery effectiveness.
